description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build & publish PyPI packages that triggers on push of tags matching v[0-9]+.** and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have a build job that runs on a matrix of OS environments, sets up Miniconda with Python, installs dependencies, builds wheels with cibuildwheel, and uploads the artifacts. Additionally, it should have two more jobs, upload_to_test_pypy and upload_to_pypi, that download the artifacts and publish them to test PyPI and PyPI respectively, with the latter only running on release events.
